goals: Explore the project directory structure to understand what kind of codebase this is
Search for files related to council services or community information
Find specific content about local government or civic resources within the codebase

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and community-focused. Prefers clear, practical information and wants to understand how local services work.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows about local government and community issues but has no technical background or knowledge of code search tools.

end_condition: The user has explored the codebase structure and found relevant information about civic or council-related content.
